securityHints.architectureReminder: Follow 5-layer pattern: Routes → Controllers → Services → Repositories → Models
securityHints.multiTenancy: ALWAYS filter by user_id or customer_id in repositories
securityHints.encryption: ALL carrier credentials MUST be encrypted with CryptoHelper
securityHints.logging: NEVER log passwords, tokens, API keys, or sensitive data
securityHints.constants: ALWAYS use @shipsmart/constants instead of hardcoded values (carriers, timeouts, status enums, validation limits)
securityHints.testing: Run tests with 'cd service && yarn test' before committing
